podcasts.name: The Ecom Academy
podcasts.title: Run your entire Shopify store using Claude Cowork.. #shorts
podcasts.transcript: how Claude co-work can find tools for you and you don't need to be specific about which tools to use and be really specific about prompts. You can just use natural language. I want to create a campaign for the end of the month and I want it to be a sales campaign. Can you please go through and look at what my best-selling product was, what the best campaign I had was, and which product had the most views, and then come up with a campaign idea for me, please. Okay, the results are in. It's done a whole heap of analysis for us. It says our best-selling product are liquid instant coffee. You know, we've had 2,300 orders. The most viewed product is the premium coffee concentrate. Also, it's pulling in all the details. It's looking at what my last campaign was, which was for Easter. It's come up with a deal, offer a clear theme box winter sale, VIP early access. And so, what's happened here is it's using our email marketing framework we have in the academy. And then now it says, "Do you want me to draft the actual emails and build them into Klaviyo?" This saves us hours and hours and hours of work. Usually, we'd have to go in and do the research ourselves, build the email campaign ourselves, go into Shopify, do the discounts, and it will basically set this whole campaign up for you. It's pretty insane, and we've been using it now as well.
